title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, Graph RAG for precise multi-hop reasoning, multi-agent validation to catch silent failures, symbolic guardrails embedded in code, and runtime steering for self-correction. The techniques reduce token waste while improving accuracy and reliability.
